generic_opener.name: Generic Opener
generic_opener.description: The response starts with a generic filler phrase like 'A shiver runs down my spine' or 'He chuckles darkly'.

ooc_break.name: Out of Character Break
ooc_break.description: The model uses an 'As an AI' language model hedge, breaking immersion entirely.

moralizing.name: Moralizing
moralizing.description: The model attempts to lecture the user or scold them in-character for something in the prompt.

refusal.name: Hard Refusal
refusal.description: The model flatly refused to generate a response (e.g., 'Sorry, I cannot assist with that').

stalling.name: Stalling
stalling.description: The scene does not advance. The model merely repeats back what the user wrote with different phrasing.

hallucination.name: Hallucination
hallucination.description: The model fabricates details that explicitly contradict the character card or the immediate previous turn.

rushing.name: Rushing
rushing.description: The model skips logical narrative steps or immediately forces the scene to its climax.

constraint_violation.name: Constraint Violation
constraint_violation.description: The model failed one or more prompt-specific hard constraints.

persona_softening.name: Persona Softening
persona_softening.description: The model dilutes a sharp or specific persona into bland agreeable voice.

timeline_break.name: Timeline Break
timeline_break.description: The response introduces events that break the stated timeline or sequence in the prompt.

safety_template.name: Safety Template
safety_template.description: The model drops into policy-template wording instead of in-character output.
